claim_bullets.bullet_text: Normal humans are common and known to everyone, with low combat ability, found in villages. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.230-234)
Bandits have henchmen, leaders, and chiefs with increasing power levels. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.230-234)
Soldiers range from normal to knight level with increasing combat abilities. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.230-234)

source_record_text: This page summarizes the Humans section (13.2.12) from *Sword World RPG - Complete Edition*, covering normal humans, bandits, soldiers, and dark priests.
